reference: Hi, welcome. It won't cause you any harm. If you are taking medication under the prescription of your doctor, then do not worry. Letrozole will help you in conceiving. Normally, it is prescribed to be taken daily during the second to sixth day of the cycle, but you should follow your doctor's instructions. You can have intercourse even before that. Since you experienced a miscarriage, it may take a little longer than expected. Thank you.
text: Hi, welcome. It will cause you any harm if you are taking medication under the prescription of your doctor. Then do not worry. Let Rosal will help you in conceiving. It is prescribed to be taken daily during the second to sixth day of the cycle. But you should follow your doctor's instructions. You can have intercourse even before that. Since you experienced a miscarriage, it may take a little longer than expected. Thank you.
